titleStmt.title: SII 36.51: original edition by P Shanmugam
No. 51. (A.R. No. 51 of 1910.) VĒPPATTŪR, KUMBAKONAM TALUK, TANJORE DISTRICT. On the north wall of the maṇḍapa in front of the central shrine in the Kaṟkaṭēśvara temple.

p.hi: Kulōttuṅga I. Year 47 and 270th day: A.D. 1118.

summary.p: Damaged and incomplete. Registers the issue of a royal order by the king Kulōttuṅgachōḻa, while seated in the hall called Rājēndrachōḻaṉ, in the palace at Muḍigoṇḍachōḻapuram, on a request made by Madhurānthaka Brahmarāyar, granting seven and (3/4) vēlis of land to the temple at Tirundudēvaṅguḍi, a dēvadāna village of the temple Gaṅgaikoṇḍachōḻīśvaramuḍāiyar situated in Miḻalai-nāḍu, a subdivision of Virudarājabhayaṅkara-vaḷanāḍu. The land was constituted into a new revenue village with a new name, Gaṅgaikoṇḍa-chōḻanallūr, after duly separating it from the original revenue village and granted as dēvadāna iṟaiyili for offerings and services to be performed in the Mādēvar temple at Tirundudēvaṅguḍi. The old rate of assessment on the granted land was set aside and a fresh rate of tax assessment amountaing to 100 kalams of paddy on one vēli was made. Accordingly fresh revenue documents were also prepared and the official order (ulvari) was issued. A revenue survey made during the time of Kulōttuṅga I is also referred to.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī pukaḻmātu viḷaṅka nilamakaḷ nilava malarmakaḷ puṇara Urimaiyiṟ ciṟanta maṇimuṭicūṭi mīṉavar nilaikeṭa vi
llavar kulaitara Ēṉai maṉṉavaririyaluṟṟuḻitara tikkaṉaittun taṉ cakkara naṭātti vīrasiṁhāsaṉattu Ulakuṭaiyāroṭum
vīṟṟiruntaruḷiya koviraācakecaripanmarāṉa tiripuvaṉac cakkaravarttikaḷ śrīkulottuṅkacoḻadevarkku yāṇṭu ṉāṟpatteḻām ṉāḷ
Irunūṟṟeḻupatiṉāl muṭikoṇṭacoḻapurattuk koyilil Uḷ ttu veḷiyil melai maṇṭapam Irājentracoḻa
ṉil catā ṇa ceyyat tiruvāymoḻintaruḷiṉapaṭi tiruntu tevan
varukiṟa nila [�tara]tenṟum Uṭaiyār kaṅkaikoṇṭacoḷīśvaramuṭaiyār tevatānan tiruntutevaṅkuṭiyi
l E tevatāṉamākki tiruntutevaṅkuṭi mātevarkkut tevatāṉa Iṟaiyiliyāka Iṭṭu Ittevar
tevatā �k ka In nilattukkut talaimāṟu Uṭaiyār kaṅkaik[ Oṇṭa coḷīśvaramu] ṭaiyārkku rājanārāyaṇava
ḷanāṭṭu nāṭṭu ḻaka cāḻac caruppetimaṅkalatti pani kaṅkaiko
ṇṭacoḻa nallūreṉṉun tiruṉāmattāl veṟu piṟikkavum peṟa veṇṭumeṉṟu tiruntutevaṉkuṭip piṭārar tirucciṟṟampalamuṭai
kkāṭṭi maturāntakap piramārāyan namakkuc coṉṉamaiyil Uṭaiyār kaṅkai koṇṭa coḷīśvaramuṭaiyār tevatāṉan tiruntuteva
ṉkuṭi nilattu Orupakkamaṭaiya Iṭum nilam Ēḻemukkāliṉāl kāṇikkaṭaṉ Ōr pāti nel Eḻunūṟṟeṇpattiru kalattiṉāl pattāṟākki nel
ṉāṉūṟṟu pattoṉpatiṉ kalaṉe tūṇikku Ittevarkkut tevatāṉa Iṟaiyiliyāy varukiṟapaṭiyum paḻampiyarum tavirntu tiruntutevaṉ
kuṭi mātevarkku nāṟpatteḻāvatu pacāṉ mutal tevatāṉa Iṟaiyiliyāy Ittevar tevatāṉam Uḷḷāka kaṇ 5vatu In nilattukku
ma kaṅkai koṇṭacoḻa rkku rājaṉārāyaṇa vaḷaṉāṭṭut taru tūr ṉāṭṭuk kaṅkāṇiyum kala
ttut taṇṇiya nilattu Eṭṭān tarattu Iṭum nilam Iraṇṭe mukkālum Ivvūroṭuṅ kūṭi Iṭukiṟa kumāramaṅkalattu nīrnilattut taṇṇiya nilattu Eṭṭān tara
ttu Iṭum nilam Aiy veliyāl Āka nilam Eḻemukkāliṉāl nilavopāti paḻaviṟai nellu Eḻunūṟṟaimpatin kalanē tūṇippatakku ṉāṉāḻikku niccayitta vo
pāti nellu ṉāṉūṟ kalattukku Eṭṭāntaram Iṭṭa vati kkip paḻaviṟai nellu Eṇpattoṉpatiṉ kalaṉe Irutū
ṇikkuṟuṇi ṉāṉāḻikku niccayitta nellu Eṇpattu mukkalaṉe mukkuṟuṇi varil cātti veṟu mutalākki Innilampaḻampaṭiyāy munyi
ṟai kaṭṭiṉapaṭiyun tavirntum Innilattukku veli Oṉṟukku nellu ṉūṟṟuk kalamāka taiṅ kalattiṉāl pat
tāṟākki nellu nāṉūṟṟaṟupattaiṅ kalamum It tevarkku veṇṭum nimantaṅkaḷukku Iṟuppatāka ṉāṟpatteḻāvatu pacāṉ mutal kaṅkai koṇṭa
coḻanallūreṉṉum piyarāl veṟu piṟittuk kuṭuppatu Ippaṭi tiruvāymoḻin taruḷiṉa Ivai kiṭāraṅkoṇṭacoḻap pallavarāyaṉ Eḻuttu
yāṇṭu 4 10 7ṉāḷ 2 100 7 10 tiṉāl veṟupiṟinta paṭikkuḷ varippaṭi Uṭaiyār kaṅkai koṇṭa coḷīśvavaramuṭaiyār tevatāṉam virutharājabha
yaṅkara vaḷaṉāṭṭu miḻalaiṉāṭṭut tiruntutevankuṭi tiruvulakaḷanteṟiṉa ṉilam ḷilp pattāṟākki n=ta4 kayikala
ṉālp pattāṟākki pon_ 7 100 8 10 kalam Itu niccayittu van=ta Ittevarkkut tevatāṉa Iṟaiyili
ṟpaṭiyum Ippaḻampiyarun tavirntu tiruntutevankuṭi mātevarkku veṇṭum nimantaṅkaḷukku Iṟuppatāka Ittevarkku ṉāṟpatteḻāvatu pa
cāṉ mutal tevatāṉa Iṟaiyiliyāy Ittevar teva Uḷḷūrkkaḷomum ṉāṟpatteḻāvatu pacāṉ mutal kūṭiṉa nilam 7 mukkāl 7
l kāṇikkaṭaṉ pon_ 7 100 8 10 2 kalam ṉāl 10 6 Ākki pon_ pon_ 4 100 6 10 4 kalam In nilattukku nilavopāti Ūr nattam Uḷḷiṭṭu nī
ṅkum nilam nilavo k kūṭi ṭikkuḷ varippaṭi virutarājabhayaṅkara vaḷaṉāṭṭu miḻalaiṉāṭṭut tiruntute
vaṉkuṭi mātevarkku Uḷḷūrkkaḷ rūpāy 4 10 4(1/4) kiśakku pon_ kāṇikkaṭaṉ pon_ 4 100 10 2ṟṟu 10 6 Ākki pon_ 3 100 4 10 7 kalam niccayitta Iv
vūroṭum Ittevarkku veṇṭum nimantaṅkaḷukku Iṟuppatāka Uṭaiyār kaṅkai koṇṭacoḷīśvaramuṭaiyārkku tevatāṉa Iṟaiyiliyāy
varukiṟapaṭiyum paḻampiyarun tavirntu Inṉāṭṭut tiruntutevankuṭi nilattu Or pakkamaṭaiya yāṇṭu 4 10 7 Āvatu pacāṉ mutal tti-�ṉil
Digital edition of SII 36.51 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
